General.Name: Shanghai Gench Education Group Ltd
General.Description: Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides higher education services in the People's Republic of China. The company primarily operates a private university in Shanghai. It provides education services and common undergraduate education services. The company also offers formal undergraduate program, and junior college program. In addition, it offers logistics management services; degree-granting higher education institution services; common undergraduate education services; enterprise services; business management services; catering management services; self-study examination tutorial services; cultural communication services; and cultural media services. Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
